name: cowork-os
description: An operating system for Claude Cowork: living memory, outcome-driven workflows, and a LinkedIn growth system. Built by Yempik.

plugins.name: cowork-os
plugins.description: Turn a Claude Cowork project into a company brain your team owns: guided setup, a Memory Update protocol, a knowledge-transfer interview, a senior strategy skill, a decision lifecycle with signal sweeps and a weekly Decision Radar, a sales/pipeline follow-up layer, a LinkedIn editor, mission mode, and recurring routines.
